## Problem

<!--
What pain are you trying to remove? Describe the user-facing problem in
concrete terms. "It would be nice to have X" is not a problem statement;
"I cannot do X without Y lines of boilerplate" is.
-->

## Proposed API

<!--
Show the call site you would like. Actual Kotlin, not pseudocode. Include
the surface you would add or change; do not start from the implementation.
-->

```kotlin
// Proposed call site.
```

## Alternatives considered

<!--
What did you try first? What workarounds exist today with CaterKtor,
raw Ktor, or another library? Why are they not good enough?
-->

## Is this already in PRD-v2 scope?

<!--
Link the relevant section of `PRD-v2.md` if the feature is already listed,
scoped out, or named as a non-goal (§11). If it is a non-goal, explain why
the non-goal reasoning does not apply to your case.
-->

## Additional context

<!-- Anything else: platform constraints, production pressure, related issues. -->
